detailed_results.question: Quais sao os 10 municípios com mais de 100 internações com a maior taxa de mortalidade?

detailed_results.question: Quais são os 10 diagnósticos com maior crescimento absoluto de internações entre os períodos 2008-2012 e 2019-2023?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: WITH p1 AS (SELECT "DIAG_PRINC", COUNT(*) AS n1 FROM internacoes WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") BETWEEN 2008 AND 2012 AND "DIAG_PRINC" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "DIAG_PRINC"), p2 AS (SELECT "DIAG_PRINC", COUNT(*) AS n2 FROM internacoes WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") BETWEEN 2019 AND 2023 AND "DIAG_PRINC" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "DIAG_PRINC") SELECT c."CD_DESCRICAO", p1.n1 AS periodo_2008_2012, p2.n2 AS periodo_2019_2023, (p2.n2 - p1.n1) AS crescimento_absoluto FROM p1 JOIN p2 ON p1."DIAG_PRINC" = p2."DIAG_PRINC" JOIN cid c ON p1."DIAG_PRINC" = c."CID" WHERE p1.n1 > 1000 ORDER BY crescimento_absoluto DESC LIMIT 10;

detailed_results.question: Quais são os 10 diagnósticos com maior queda absoluta de internações entre os períodos 2008-2012 e 2019-2023?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: WITH p1 AS (SELECT "DIAG_PRINC", COUNT(*) AS n1 FROM internacoes WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") BETWEEN 2008 AND 2012 AND "DIAG_PRINC" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "DIAG_PRINC"), p2 AS (SELECT "DIAG_PRINC", COUNT(*) AS n2 FROM internacoes WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") BETWEEN 2019 AND 2023 AND "DIAG_PRINC" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "DIAG_PRINC") SELECT c."CD_DESCRICAO", p1.n1 AS periodo_2008_2012, p2.n2 AS periodo_2019_2023, (p1.n1 - p2.n2) AS queda_absoluta FROM p1 JOIN p2 ON p1."DIAG_PRINC" = p2."DIAG_PRINC" JOIN cid c ON p1."DIAG_PRINC" = c."CID" WHERE p1.n1 > 1000 ORDER BY queda_absoluta DESC LIMIT 10;

detailed_results.question: Quais municípios com mais de 1000 internações têm taxa de internação em UTI mais de duas vezes acima da média nacional?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: WITH media_nacional AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN "VAL_UTI" > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taxa_uti_nacional FROM internacoes) SELECT mu.nome, mu.estado, COUNT(*) AS total_internacoes, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN i."VAL_UTI" > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS taxa_uti_local, ROUND(mn.taxa_uti_nacional, 2) AS taxa_uti_nacional FROM internacoes i JOIN municipios mu ON i."MUNIC_RES" = mu.codigo_6d, media_nacional mn GROUP BY mu.nome, mu.estado, mn.taxa_uti_nacional HAVING COUNT(*) > 1000 AND SUM(CASE WHEN i."VAL_UTI" > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) > 2 * mn.taxa_uti_nacional ORDER BY taxa_uti_local DESC LIMIT 10;

detailed_results.question: Quais são os 10 municípios com maior taxa de mortalidade em internações obstétricas, entre aqueles com mais de 200 internações obstétricas e taxa acima da média nacional obstétrica?

detailed_results.question: Em qual mês de cada ano (2008-2023) ocorreu o maior número de internações em UTI?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ano, mes, total_uti FROM (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") AS ano, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "DT_INTER") AS mes, COUNT(*) AS total_uti, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM internacoes WHERE "VAL_UTI" > 0 AND "DT_INTER" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ano, mes) sub WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY ano;

detailed_results.question: Quais os 3 municípios com maior taxa de mortalidade hospitalar, por estado (MA e RS), entre municípios com mais de 500 internações?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT municipio, estado, ROUND(taxa_mortalidade, 2) AS taxa_mortalidade FROM (SELECT mu.nome AS municipio, mu.estado, SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taxa_mortalidade, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mu.estado ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM internacoes i JOIN municipios mu ON i."MUNIC_RES" = mu.codigo_6d WHERE mu.estado IN ('MA', 'RS') GROUP BY mu.nome, mu.estado HAVING COUNT(*) > 500) sub WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY estado, municipio
detailed_results.predicted_sql: WITH taxa_mortalidade AS ( SELECT mu.nome, mu.estado, COUNT(*) AS total_internacoes, SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_mortes, SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taxa FROM internacoes i JOIN municipios mu ON i."MUNIC_RES" = mu.codigo_6d WHERE mu.estado IN ('MA', 'RS') GROUP BY mu.nome, mu.estado HAVING COUNT(*) > 500 ), ranked_municipios AS ( SELECT nome, estado, taxa, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY estado ORDER BY taxa DESC) AS rn FROM taxa_mortalidade ) SELECT nome, estado, taxa FROM ranked_municipios WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY estado, taxa DESC;
